chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-6975 of 2016 Date Order with signature of Judge ________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No. 23690/2020 2. For hearing of main case 28.10.2025 Mr. Muhammad Shahid advocate for the petitioner Ms. Humaira Jatoi for SBCA Mr. Ali Safdar AAG Mr. Zulfiqar Ali for K-E -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Learned counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press the instant petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Wasim PS
